title: Programming language comparison table
prompt: Create a comparison table of five popular programming languages: Python, JavaScript, Rust, Go, and Java. Compare them across these dimensions: typing system (static/dynamic), primary use case, performance characteristics, learning curve, and package ecosystem maturity.

title: Historical events timeline table
prompt: Create a timeline table of 10 pivotal events in the history of the internet, from ARPANET (1969) through the invention of the World Wide Web, the dot-com bubble, social media emergence, and up to the AI boom. Include columns for year, event name, key people or organizations involved, and a brief description of its significance.

title: Nutrient comparison table
prompt: Create a nutrient comparison table for common breakfast foods: oatmeal, eggs, Greek yogurt, whole wheat toast, and a banana. Include columns for calories per serving, protein (g), carbohydrates (g), fat (g), fiber (g), and key vitamins or minerals. Use realistic nutritional data.

title: REST API endpoint reference table
prompt: Create an API endpoint reference table for a hypothetical task management API. Include endpoints for CRUD operations on tasks, projects, and users. Columns should be: HTTP method, endpoint path, description, request body (brief), and response status codes. Include at least 8 endpoints covering GET, POST, PUT, and DELETE operations.

title: Pros and cons analysis table
prompt: Create a pros and cons comparison table for three common state management solutions in React applications: React Context API, Redux Toolkit, and Zustand. Include columns for the solution name, key advantages (2-3 each), key disadvantages (2-3 each), best suited for, and bundle size impact.
